servinfo.title: Scan Tool Active Test Table

attention3.ptxt: Active test name can be read by selecting “Headlight Auto Leveling” menu on SUZUKI scan tool.

servinfo.ptxt: SUZUKI scan tool includes output test function which can force operation of the following actuator controlled by headlight auto leveling and washer control module. When a malfunction is found in system controlled by headlight auto leveling and washer control module, execute output test for easy judgment of whether the malfunction is on the input or output side of headlight auto leveling and washer control module. For detailed information on operation of SUZUKI scan tool, refer to “SUZUKI Scan Tool Operator’s Manual”.
